text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, June 23. No work meetings today. You have gardening in the front walkway and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Reading a new book before bed. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading a new book before bed. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Having dinner with our friends tonight. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Neighborhood connections are fun. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 3-2! The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Let's organize the menu. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Good weekend progress on home projects. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
